name: langguard-arbiter
description: LangGuard Arbiter — in-harness agent policy enforcement for Google Antigravity. Gates every MCP tool call against your LangGuard tenant policies at the PreToolUse seam: deterministic ALLOW / DENY / FORCE-ASK (ASK renders Antigravity's force_ask prompt, which always asks and ignores cached Always-Allow grants), plus a best-effort catastrophic-command deny on native shell. Runs a session-local policy daemon on 127.0.0.1:52746 (shared with the LangGuard Claude Code / Codex / Cursor plugins) and downloads a SHA-256-pinned OPA binary on first use. No LLM in the enforcement loop.
